titleStmt.title: SII 9.628: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 628. (A.R. No. 317 of 1925.) ON A SLAB BUILT INTO A FRONT WALL OF THE KARNAM'S HOUSE AT KOTTUR, KUDLIGI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Māgha, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1548 January 20, Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Aḷiya Rāmarāja-Mahā-arasu exempted the barbers of Koṭṭūra-sīme from teṟige, kaḍḍāya, biṭṭi, koṭṭaṇa and other taxes. The order containing the gift was made in favour of Timmōja, Bhadrōja, Koṇḍōja and other representatives.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi
caṁdracāmaracāravē .
trayilōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivarā
yarū vidyānagariyali sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyiUttaṁ
yiddalli sālivāhanasakha 1469 ne
ya plavaṁgasaṁvacharada māgha
śuddha 10 lu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Aḷi
ya rāmarājadēvamahāarasugaḷu
nāyeṁdara ti(ṁ)mmōja koṁḍōja bhadrō
jagaḷu muṁtāda dēśābhāgada nāyiṁ
darige sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi biṭṭu ko
ṭṭūra sīmeya nāyiṁdarige ta
ṟige kaṁḍāya biṭi koṭṭaṇa yē
nū yilla Eṁdu koṭṭa sāsana yi
dake Āru tappidavaru Ā nāyi
dara makkaḷu .

ta pprasiddha rmunistōma Lines 21—23 do not seem to be connected with the above record.
nūlaviṁda nirmala dēvaru śuddha ṁgoḍeya
ḍeyaru baradaru virupaṁ besageyida śāsanake maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 9.628 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
